_provenance.tier_reason: CN primary-source individual-stock disclosure not in v2.0.0 scope

tier_note: Tier 2 only — CN primary-source individual-stock disclosure (cninfo / HKEXnews) not in v2.0.0 scope. yfinance financials is the current floor.

yfinance_info._warning: yfinance is an unofficial scraper. DO NOT use for financial statements (income statement, balance sheet, cash flow). Use SEC EDGAR for financials.

yfinance_financials_annual._warning: Yahoo Finance is an unofficial scraper. Financial statements may be stale, incomplete, or diverge from regulator filings. For JP tickers (.T), prefer edinet_client.py (primary-source 金融庁 Tier A) when EDINET_API_KEY is set.

yfinance_financials_quarterly._warning: Yahoo Finance is an unofficial scraper. Financial statements may be stale, incomplete, or diverge from regulator filings. For JP tickers (.T), prefer edinet_client.py (primary-source 金融庁 Tier A) when EDINET_API_KEY is set.

cn_specific.primary_source_note: cninfo (CSRC-mandated annual reports) / HKEXnews integration deferred. All canonical financials are yfinance Tier 2 (CAS / converged-IFRS via Yahoo). CNY for A-shares, HKD for .HK tickers.
cn_specific.consolidated_basis_note: yfinance reports consolidated (合并) statements. Parent-only (母公司) and segment data not exposed; needs cninfo for full granularity.
